nodes.label: Case 01 — Cloudflare-native Auth Layer for Fintech
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.norm_label: case 01 — cloudflare-native auth layer for fintech

nodes.label: Principle: Read the System Before You Touch It
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.rationale: Every engagement starts with a written audit — what's in place, what's load-bearing, what's quietly bleeding budget or risk.
nodes.norm_label: principle: read the system before you touch it

nodes.label: Principle: Boundaries Over Abstractions
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.rationale: Fewer layers, clearer contracts — prefer honest code over framework indirection.

nodes.label: Principle: Security Is a Posture, Not a Sprint
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.rationale: Hardening lives in the defaults — headers, cookies, build, dependencies, deploy. Audited, not bolted on.
nodes.norm_label: principle: security is a posture, not a sprint

nodes.label: Principle: Ship in the Open
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.rationale: Public branches, short cycles, written decisions — clients can read the diff before the invoice.

nodes.label: Principle: Tooling Earns Its Keep
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.rationale: Scripts that save a teammate a meeting a week pay for themselves in a month.

nodes.label: Principle: Leave It Better Documented
nodes.author: Salvatore Pesti
nodes.rationale: The handoff is the deliverable — architecture diagrams, runbooks, decision logs written for the next person.
